name: small_sims_and_neighbors_overrides
description: Caller overrides simulation_paths and neighbor_k away from defaults. Ensures the parameter wiring works regardless of how defaults are named after extraction (MC_DEFAULT_SIMULATION_PATHS / MC_DEFAULT_NEIGHBOR_K). Uses numpy seed 123 to demonstrate determinism under a different seed.
derivation: Re-captured from the fixed producer at branch fix/mc-knn-exit-gate HEAD 7ff61a4 (Cluster 2) with run_monte_carlo(..., seed=123). Exercises non-default parameters: simulation_paths=100, neighbor_k=10. The value shifted from the pre-Cluster-2 100.0 because AC-1 standardizes the kNN feature vector and AC-4 excludes the early-window days — both intentionally change which days enter the bootstrap. Still verifies the parameter wiring (simulation_paths/neighbor_k overrides). Provenance: captured-from-the-fixed-producer.
